title: Mace Enchantment Textures
description: Adds custom textures to the Mace when it is enchanted with Density or Breach!
body:
Adds custom textures to the Mace when it is enchanted with Density or Breach!



**You need [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) to use this resource pack as intended! The textures will not showup otherwise.**

Red Density Mace Preview:
![Red Density Mace Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03a154c9556810477b6aeb3a9a9a7460c00a26d0.png)

Blue Breach Mace Preview:
![Blue Breach Mace Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/307be9d4fc1683f9238534909c5306a512c2ee6f.png)
